Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-23 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
LINC ranks #1 today with an exceptional 95.4 score, driven by extraordinary long-term returns of 1,294.72% over 10 years and 509.38% over 5 years, while outperforming SPY by 1,070.88% and 443.75% respectively over those same periods. The momentum metrics are exceptionally clean with a strong_buy flag, all four moving averages in bullish alignment, and a confirmed volatility ratio of 1.954, though the stock shows elevated 1-month returns of 32.08% suggesting recent acceleration. ISSC ranks #2 with a 1-year return of 328.94% and exceptional short-term momentum (3-month ratio of 4.69x), dramatically outperforming SPY by 312.98% over the past year, but its weaker 5-year to 1-year ratio of 1.2x indicates this is a more recent phenomenon than LINC's sustained multi-decade outperformance. Both stocks pass all ratio thresholds and maintain strong technicals, but LINC demonstrates the more consistent multi-year momentum profile that the long-term ranker is designed to identify, while ISSC appears to be a sharper recent acceleration play.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
